name: Cream Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the light crust setting.
2. If desired, add chocolate chips, raisins, or other dried fruits at the beep.
3. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
4. Form the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking pan.
5. Bake according to the light crust setting instructions.
6. Turn off the oven when the bread is cooked through.
